speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe an object you like

cueCard.topic: Describe an object you often use.
bullets: what colour and size it is
and explain why you like it

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about my bag. It is a small red bag. I bought it last year. I use it every day because it is light and not too big.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Everyday objects
questions: What is in your bag right now?
Do you often lose things like keys or tickets?
Is your phone new or old?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I have my key, my glasses, and my phone in my bag. I sometimes lose my keys. My phone is quite new.
